record.field: Returns sales summary with totals, quantities and top customers. Filter by period (today, week, month, year) and state (draft=quotation, sale=confirmed, done=locked). Useful for questions like "how much did we sell this month?", "how many open orders?".
Creates a quotation (sale.order) with product lines. Provide the customer (name or ID) and products with quantities. The system automatically resolves product prices.
Returns invoicing summary: total billed, receivable, overdue, and top debtors. Filter by period. Useful for "how much do we have receivable?", "who is overdue?".

Returns CRM pipeline summary: opportunities by stage, total value, and recent opportunities. Useful for "how is the pipeline?", "how many opportunities do we have?", "what is the total pipeline value?".
Creates a lead or opportunity in the CRM. Provide name, contact, expected revenue and description.

Returns project and task summary: tasks by stage, overdue tasks, logged hours. Filter by project or assignee. Useful for "how are my projects?", "how many overdue tasks?", "how many hours did I log?".
Log worked hours (timesheet) on a task. Provide the task (name or ID), hours and description of the work done.
Creates a task in a project. Provide the project, task name, description and assignee.
Search contacts by name, email, phone or company. Returns complete data including address, recent sales and balance. More complete than search_odoo for contacts.
Creates a contact (person or company) with complete data.

{ "type": "object", "properties": { "name": {"type": "string", "description": "Full name or company name"}, "email": {"type": "string"}, "phone": {"type": "string"}, "mobile": {"type": "string"}, "is_company": {"type": "boolean", "description": "True for company, False for person"}, "company": {"type": "string", "description": "Parent company name (for company contacts)"}, "street": {"type": "string"}, "city": {"type": "string"}, "state": {"type": "string", "description": "State (abbreviation)"}, "zip": {"type": "string", "description": "ZIP code"}, "vat": {"type": "string", "description": "Tax ID / VAT number"} }, "required": ["name"] }
Returns purchase summary: total orders, amounts, pending orders and top suppliers. Useful for "how much did we spend this month?", "how many pending purchase orders?".
Query product stock levels. Search by product name, show only low stock items, or list by warehouse. Useful for "how much of [product] do we have?", "which products are out of stock?".
List recent stock movements (incoming, outgoing, internal transfers). Filter by product, operation type or period.
Query employee data: list, department, job, contract. Useful for "how many employees do we have?", "who is in department X?".
Query calendar events. Shows appointments, meetings and upcoming events for a period. Useful for "what's on my calendar today?", "which meetings this week?".
Creates a calendar event. Provide title, start/end datetime, and attendees.
Query expenses (hr.expense): pending approval, approved, paid. Useful for "which expenses are pending?", "how much did I spend this month?".
Creates a customer invoice (out_invoice) or vendor bill (in_invoice). Provide customer/vendor and lines with product and amount.
Register payment on an invoice. Provide the invoice number (e.g. INV/2026/0001) and amount. If no amount specified, pays the full balance.
Creates a purchase order (RFQ). Provide the supplier and lines with products and quantities.
Search products by name, internal reference or barcode. Returns complete data including price, stock and category.
Creates a product in Odoo. Provide name, type, sale price and cost.
Creates an expense. Provide description, amount and date. The expense stays in draft for approval.
Sends an internal message to one or more users in Odoo Discuss. Useful for quick internal communication.
Returns ranking of best-selling products by quantity or revenue. Filter by period. Useful for "which are the best-selling products?", "top 10 products this month".
Returns salesperson ranking by total sales value. Filter by period. Useful for "which salesperson sold the most?", "salesperson ranking".
Lists overdue invoices (past due and unpaid). Shows customer, amount, days overdue. Useful for "who owes us?", "overdue invoices".
Lists open positions and applicants. Filter by department or job. Useful for "how many open positions?", "applicants for [job]".
Lists website events. Shows upcoming events, registered attendees and available seats. Useful for "what are the next events?", "how many registered for event X?".

Generates a PDF report from HTML and sends it as a document in the chat. Use this when the user asks for a report, summary, or any data formatted as a PDF document. You must provide the complete HTML content with tables, metrics, and formatting. Use CSS classes: "metric" for KPI cards (with "value" and "label" divs inside), "success"/"danger" for colored text, standard HTML tables for data. The system adds styling automatically. Examples: "send me a sales report", "generate a PDF with overdue invoices", "I need a project status document".
Lists installed Odoo modules. Filter by name or status. Useful for "which modules are installed?", "is module X installed?".
Returns Odoo system information: version, database, number of users, record counts per main model. Useful for "what Odoo version?", "how many active users?".
Shows active users, last login, and pending activities. Useful for "who is online?", "when did user X last login?".
